items.title: Tesla starts selling Chinese-made Model 3s in Canada at the EV's lowest price ever
items.summary: The cars made at the Giga Shanghai factory start at $39,490 CAD, or roughly $29,000 in USD for a Model 3 Premium Rear-Wheel Drive variant.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Netflix delays Greta Gerwig’s ‘Narnia’ movie for big theatrical push in 2027
items.summary: "The Magician's Nephew" looks like a big next step in Netflix's thawing relationship with movie theaters.
